The '''''Obsidian''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[XQ1 Platform]] where [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]] developed a series of prototype [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]] as part of the [[TIE Experimental Project]]. The facility was defended by several TIE Fighter squadrons and the [[Imperial Research Ship|science research ship]] ''[[Sardis]]''.

==History==
The station, along with the ''Sardis'', was destroyed in a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] attack shortly following the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. Zaarin was able to salvage remnants of the ''Obsidian''{{'s}} computer from its debris.

==Behind the scenes==
In the final cutscene of the second tour of duty in ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'', Zaarin orders his crew to return to the ''Obsidian'' station, though it had been destroyed in the previous battle.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
